name: http-protocol-audit
title: HTTP Protocol & Compression Audit
description: Audit HTTPS, HTTP/2, HTTP/3 (QUIC via Alt-Svc), Brotli/gzip compression, cache-validation headers, and HSTS for any URL. Returns an A-F grade and a punch-list of perf wins worth shipping (most sites leave 30-50% performance on the table by not enabling HTTP/3 or Brotli).
